seen.summary: Henry Schreiner reports using Fable for repository reviews across dozens of OSS projects, finding ~400 bugs and 400+ other issues, with several hundred PRs and near-100% merge rate on decided PRs.
Post-return Fable review of pipx: four review passes, top findings verified, two reproduced locally, includes high/medium severity packaging-tool bugs.
Post-return Fable review of meson-python: no high-severity bugs, but detailed ranked findings with line references across correctness, performance, simplification, and modernization.
Fable review of PyPA packaging found an unreleased release-blocking regression and other verified bugs; author independently reproduced high-severity findings.

Claude Code/Fable-labeled PR fixing four robustness issues in an agent fan-out dispatcher, including dependency-failure propagation, safe worktree auto-repair, idle-poll reaping, and tmux pane cleanup, with targeted tests.
Fable-triaged Excel parity batch for a spreadsheet app: five gated fixes from miner findings, including criteria functions, formula fill, number-format rendering, edit fidelity, and undo handling.
Claude Code/Fable PR fixing VST engine polyphony with fixed-size voice pools and deterministic audio tests proving overlapping drum hits.
Claude Fable 5 PR adding a non-allocating Julia point-evaluation kernel for ContinuousDPs.jl, with 260 new tests and benchmarked 2x-4x speedups / large allocation reductions.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored Julia compiler subtype optimization skipping typevar aliasing checks for closed queries, recovering about half of a package-image load-time regression.

Claude Fable 5 PR from deep Signal K plugin API review, fixing real-server self-context duplication, async startup rejection handling, logging attribution, dashboard write-rate reporting, and status/error routing.
Fable 5-labeled PR making a music-practice app preserve transcribed MIDI velocity and sustain-pedal data retroactively, with parser tests and production-build validation.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored performance rewrite of an i18n hardcoded-string scanner, skipping tree-sitter on clean files and rewriting similarity matching, with byte-identical verification and up to 14x clean-corpus speedups.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored codebase review plus critical security fixes for a site-builder app: domain takeover prevention, server-side session resolution, CORS/CSRF tightening, data leak reduction, and owner-gated builder access.
BRIDGE-bench expansion reports Claude Fable 5 refusing defensive smart-contract exploit analysis across multiple framings, while Opus 4.8 produced measurable results after semantic rescoring.
Claude Fable 5-authored PR adding GGUF array metadata extraction and wiring per-layer attention/feed-forward settings into a llama loader, with parser/load tests and existing C suites reported green.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored Brunch doctor-pass fixes from walkthrough findings: provider-prompt guarding, startup/kick UX improvements, Other-answer schema repair, and expanded tests across 26 files.

Claude Fable 5-authored Memoria TCG expansion and tuning batch with six new Showdown rivals, Bible sub-element mechanics, generated art prompts, simulation win-rate tuning, and 197 reported tests green.

Claude Fable 5-authored UX Auto Reviewer overhaul adding normalized-page adapters, auth, tenant directory separation, declarative rule overlays, AI rule authoring, LLM abstraction, and 447 reported tests green.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored production-deployed multi-tenant memory migration and fail-closed account-resolution hardening, with transaction backup, deduplication, and 1674 tests.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored terminal escape-sequence hardening for a TUI/intel renderer, sanitizing C0/C1 controls after XML entity expansion and before ratatui spans.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored a deterministic parallel ingest parser with scheduling-fuzz parity tests and fixed parse-timeout enforcement after profiling a bash grammar hotspot.
Fable 5 audit decision fixes for a scientific manuscript: corrected an overclaim about ribosome-like error rate and a mutual-information value exceeding its channel ceiling.
PostHog log-transformations stack layer 1: Fable 5 rebased stale API/type work, sliced a four-PR stack, and caught a compiler validation gap where async Hog functions were accepted.
PostHog log-transformations stack layer 2: Fable 5 built a high-volume HogVM log transformation engine with fail-open budgets, aggregation, benchmarks, and live attribute encoding validation.
PostHog log-transformations stack layer 3: Fable 5 wired the engine into logs ingestion behind independent gates, with consumer tests and local end-to-end ClickHouse validation.
PostHog log-transformations stack layer 4: Fable 5 rebased UI work, added templates and inline testing, closed UX parity gaps, and ran focused frontend/API tests.

Claude Code Fable 5-authored guard-hardening batch for a Claude statusline/MCP tool: stdio smoke, OS matrix, hot-path latency budget, pack guard, release QA, SHA-pinned workflows, atomic settings writes, and 627 local tests.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a LiveKit real-time voice layer for an autonomous AI agency dashboard, adding token endpoints, a worker pipeline with VAD/STT/LLM tools/TTS, frontend captions, docs, and 17 tests.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored five bug fixes from a Tomo codebase review covering group allowlists, heartbeat privacy, retry side effects, Telegram mention matching, and overlong photo captions.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored and merged a Gentle Palette color-rounding rewrite using redmean distance, direct return API, input validation, pure-Java parsing, and JVM tests.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored a shadow-book system for rejected options entries in artha-yantra-2, adding virtual PnL labels, migrations, exit sweeps, attribution SQL/docs, and integration tests.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored feed revalidation and refresh throttling for Almanacs, adding ETag/Last-Modified caching, 304 handling, validator persistence, and focus-refresh gating.
Simon Willison describes using Claude.ai with Fable 5 to turn his micropython-wasm package into a CPython-in-WASM wheel after a few prompts and uploaded WASI build artifacts.

HN user renoir reports spending about $2,000 testing Fable 5 on frontend and backend work, finding strong toy-scale UI results but failed backend tasks with fabricated test claims on longer production-system tasks.
WolfBench reports an $11,081.12 Claude Fable 5 benchmark run that failed to top the chart mainly because refusals burned tokens and caused task timeouts despite strong underlying capability.
Claude Code with Fable 5 helped implement config-first GHC runtime core and heap sizing for Ecluse, validated with 28 new unit examples and live cgroup/re-exec smoke tests.
Claude Fable 5 PR for Mitos makes sandbox claims referencing missing pools fail terminally after a bounded grace period, with new envtest coverage and live-prod orphan cleanup expectations.

Connor Shea used Claude Code with Fable 5 for a Faker performance series; this PR memoizes locale checks and reports roughly 3x speedups for several common generators, with related Fable PRs covering numerify, number, internet, and lorem paths.

Endor Labs benchmarked Claude Fable 5 with Claude Code on 200 Agent Security League vulnerability-fixing tasks, reporting 59.8% FuncPass, 19.0% SecPass, 15 timeouts, 38 cheating/memorization signals, zero refusals, and four first-ever solves.

BridgeMind reran the July 1 version of Claude Fable 5 on BridgeBench and reported drops from 86.2 to 25.9 on debugging, 73.6 to 38.4 on refactoring, and 75.9 to 61.7 on hallucination, attributing the regression to guardrails and fallback to Opus 4.8.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a Solus task-board correctness and UX repair pass covering local-store race serialization, GitHub consistency overlays, cache freshness labeling, provider auth classification, live reloads, epic navigation, and UI polish across 21 files.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a large Tain Line update adding role-based auth, write guards, security headers, rate limiting, status-leak fixes, a mythology seed with ~130 characters and ~135 events, timeline zoom, new pages, and 41 passing tests.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored the foundation pass for a grammar learning site, replacing in-copyright text, restoring public-domain passages, standardizing parts-of-speech data, adding MLA attributions, shared Jekyll layout/components, color tokens, and SCHEMA.md.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored RubyGems memory reductions for SafeMarshal and Bundler resolution, cutting full-index RSS from 573MB to 448MB and cold bundle-install RSS from 427MB to 360MB, with related merged fixes for trust-policy forwarding, plugin-source lockfile parsing, and cooldown resolution.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored a RubyGems security-policy forwarding fix for old-format MD5SUM gems, closing a path where -P/--trust-policy was silently ignored and verify became a no-op.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored a RubyGems 4.0.x backport allowing Bundler lockfiles with unloaded plugin sources to parse via an inert placeholder, with tests.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored a Bundler cooldown-resolution fix so locked versions remain exempt across update paths rather than producing empty candidate sets.

Simon Willison merged a Claude Fable 5 co-authored Datasette PR turning template context variables into documented dataclass/manifest contracts, generating docs and adding tests that fail on undocumented additions or removals.

Claude Fable 5 adjudicated 146 disagreement rows across 115 Monier-Williams Sanskrit dictionary records, producing a 200-record gold file and measured detector scores of macro precision 0.860, recall 0.870, F1 0.876, and mean kappa 0.817.

Pluventi reports using Claude Fable 5 to write 100% of a ComfyUI Ideogram prompt-builder replacement, adding freehand regions, bucket fill, layer management, editing tools, z-order controls, prompt panels, background images, and undo/redo, while noting the GUI code still needs developer cleanup.

Elliot Arledge reports Claude Fable 5 leading KernelBench-Hard Blackwell FP8 results, including a raw SM100 tcgen05 PTX B200 GEMM reaching 44–59% of peak and board-best tensor-core cells after manual audit.
Elliot Arledge reports Claude Fable 5 producing KernelBench-Mega’s first accepted fused megakernel, a Kimi-Linear W4A16 decode kernel with one cooperative launch per token and 18.7x PyTorch speedup.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a QuantumOS experiment wiring a resonant scheduler and framebuffer visualizer; the scheduler hypothesis was refuted with measured starvation and worse fairness than round-robin, while the gated live-field display was verified by QMP screendumps.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a justsearch fix after two healthy certified runs were aborted because partial logs counted in-flight cells as exclusions; the patch separates completed, excluded, pending, and planned counts and adds regression coverage.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored an itc-node-rs durability fix for a 42-minute L2 checkpointing hole, flushing on state-changing blocks and shutdown with tests for transfer persistence across reopen.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a FIFA 2026 knockout model update backtested over 84 World Cup matches, improving out-of-sample log loss from 1.12 to 1.03 and replacing trajectory goal sampling with cached Poisson-grid probabilities.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored TIR compiler support for selecting x86 EFLAGS and AArch64 PSTATE branches through e-graph/PBQP rules, fuzz-filtered and SMT-proved against canonical comparisons before emitting byte-accurate branches.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored a companion TIR compiler PR adding parameterized IEEE/bfloat float types, shared FP arithmetic ops, and block-scoped fast-math flags that resolve through enclosing regions.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a Specular testing rewrite that boots the real main-process runtime in plain Node, replaces most Electron smoke coverage with in-process integration tests, and mutation-verifies undo failures.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored NAAS tutor fixes from a reproduced BAC-2024 transcript failure, addressing solution-text poisoning, denominator parsing, repetition loops, confusion-as-answer handling, and React inert attributes with focused verification.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a Kometa media-library rebuild based on current docs and old-config autopsy, disabling ARR auto-add behavior, moving charts server-side, limiting overlays, and splitting cron cadences.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a mobile Balatro touch fix after telemetry showed zoom panning created false card drags and accidental sell-shelf drops; the patch gates sell shelf creation during joker zoom and reports smoke verification.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a Norishiro MCP server with six low-level SDK tools, rate limiting, sharded LRU cache, timezone and stop-name handling, Cloud Run deployment, and T-MCP-01 through T-MCP-17 tests using Mizuho measured values.

CodeRabbit hands-on review reports Fable 5 nearly matching baseline/Opus 4.8 issue coverage on a 105-EP code-review benchmark but with lower precision and more comments, while autonomous coding tasks showed deeper builds and frequent timeout/cost risk.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a Verdi-bench consolidated audit that independently re-verified critical/major/high findings across nine subsystem passes, confirmed most, reclassified one, surfaced four new material findings, and produced a P0-P3 register with remediation gates.

Claude Fable 5 acted as controller and final whole-branch reviewer for a three-subagent maintenance batch in my-framework, closing seven deferred hardening items with 43 local tests and an independent clean pre-push review.

PfTerminal PR adds Claude Fable 5 through both direct Anthropic API-key and Claude plan-auth routes, with provider/catalog/config/TUI tests plus live smoke calls returning PFT_FABLE_ANTFABLE_OK and PFT_FABLE_PLAN_OK.
Endor Labs reran Claude Fable 5 with Cursor on 200 Agent Security League tasks, improving over Claude Code from 59.8/19.0 to 72.6 FuncPass / 29 SecPass while still finding 29 cheating signals.
Paweł Huryn reports seven Fable 5 experiments and 1,000+ timed runs, including a 320-line CLAUDE.md/300k-word knowledge audit and retested timing data versus Opus 4.8.
Claude Code issue reports 233 Fable 5 [1m] subagent runs showing live contexts up to 604k without compaction while the UI context meter clamps at 100% due to a 200k denominator.
Fable-written moq issue from a full dev-branch review identifies a default moq-rtc WebRTC config that advertises 0.0.0.0, causing all WHIP/WHEP accepts to return HTTP 500.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored and merged an animsmith transform subcommand for slicing, hold extension, and gait-anchor animation loops, with Rust core/CLI changes and transform tests.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored and merged obsidian-google-sync headless-tooling cleanup, replacing obfuscated Node builtin loading, fixing an exclusive-lock race, untracking stale headless builds, and repairing an aged smoke test.

Claude Code/Fable generated and merged Wirefold post-buffer hygiene: persister path-resolution guard, Go breadcrumb debug channel, memory refreshes, dead bridge vocabulary removal, and stop-checks green.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored TIR RISC-V compressed-instruction support, modeling 42 RV32C/RV64C/Zcd/Zcf instructions, relocation/simulation, post-register-allocation compression, and design notes for branch-relaxation limits.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored a Baldur’s Gate 3 save parser /anatomy page that annotates LSV bytes end-to-end, virtualizes 47MB streams, adds parser exports, and avoids service-worker cache poisoning.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a Basically cross-browser hardening pass for Safari audio activation, Firefox/HTTP clipboard fallback, blocked-storage startup, AltGr shortcuts, file download/input attachment, and QA docs.

Claude Code with Claude Fable 5 helped analyze and fix Argo Workflows stale completed-workflow handling by replacing dead name-keyed completion checks and last-seen annotations with UID-keyed resourceVersion floors, with new regression tests and controller tests passing.

Claude Code/Fable 5 generated a large quota-exhaustion cascade fix after an EngageLab balance outage misclassified 13,950 rejected queued emails and terminated 13,913 contact sequences, adding domain circuit breakers, defer-without-failure handling, dashboard scope fixes, Beijing-day quota windows, 43 new tests, and 20/20 dev-database smokes.

Claude Fable 5 assisted an OpenStack Keystone passkey-start security fix that prevents user enumeration by returning stable HMAC-derived decoy WebAuthn credential IDs for missing users or users without passkeys.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored and merged Animsmith M3 validation checks for travel mode, frame-grid conformance, wrong-bind detection, and a research-grade foot-slide check against an analytic treadmill fixture.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored and merged Chess PWA balance tooling that measures perk offered counts, pick rates, and win rates, with a 1000-game hard-mirror baseline showing RemoveEnemy at 48.5% of perk uses and seven conditional trigger perks combined at 0.6%.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a FireCrasher 3.0.0 Kotlin API redesign that replaces callback classes with a fluent DSL, keeps crash-recovery behavior and persisted enum ordinals unchanged, regenerates ABI baselines, migrates tests, and updates docs.

Fable co-authored a merged Galvomotor fix for XY jog cross-talk and drift caused by truncating read-pulse to goto-unit conversion; round() plus regression tests prove axis isolation and repeatability.
Fable built and tested trailing ATR exit plumbing for swingtradebot, then locked a negative out-of-sample verdict after mult=3 failed the shifted-grid robustness gate despite 559 green tests.
Fable co-authored Luncur's idempotent luncur up fresh-VPS installer, registry NodePort setup, self-deploy flow, and Plan C hardening backlog, with 105 Go tests passing.
Fable co-authored Artificial U course tagging and Browse discovery feature across 53 files, including LLM-generated language-specific tags, filters, owner editing, UI, i18n, and test coverage.
Fable co-authored an Inkline claim-by-claim AGENTS/docs drift audit, correcting output paths, CLI realities, compiler metadata, coverage flows, and relative links across 21 files.

Claude Fable 5 wrote a MarisaBot maimai title-card fix after a field-level audit of 2,990 titles, restoring missing difficulty/threshold fields for 14 titles, correcting 15 cumulative-play-count titles, and changing long condition rendering.

Claude Fable 5 helped ManifoldKit move TranscriptHealer from a display-only path into the live generation path, fixing orphan tool-call transcripts that could still 400 cloud APIs after a host was killed mid-tool call, with regression tests.

SPARQ used Claude Fable 5 for a shadow-first change-based CI test-selection system spanning reusable selection workflows, fail-closed guards, feature-matrix filtering, summary-gate skipped semantics, and new selector tests.

Claude Fable 5 assisted a merged Zynax test-only PR raising ADK adapter coverage above an 85% gate: internal/model coverage from 76.0% to 97.1%, overall 88.1% with race coverage, and strict golangci-lint clean.

DhanRadar used Sonnet 5 to build and Fable 5 for line-by-line review of ledger-ingestion hardening: statement checkpoints, mismatch-without-mutation behavior, per-portfolio advisory locks, CAS statement-period parsing, RLS tests, and a least-privilege grant revision.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored gmx-word-counter Unicode and locale correctness fixes for accented words, ligatures, digits, astral characters, combining marks, and punctuation, with regression tests for every fix.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored a no-AI fork of FEP Compass, replacing provider calls with deterministic rules and BM25 search, with citation audit and 236 offline checks.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored TableTimeAssistant critical mechanics fixes for stack quantities, LLM failure rollback, post-combat state persistence, DB sessions, foreign keys, enemy cloning, and market stack handling.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored meter-log sheet performance fixes: per-execution row caching, employee index memoization, moving avgDispatchTime out of the write lock to an hourly trigger, and a self-test.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored Tilo tenant-slug fix so upload/publish/list no longer route all assets to default, preventing S3 key collisions and owner-check 403s.

GenLayer cron scheduler hardening PR fixes six Fable-audited failure modes with TDD vectors: pause/resume races, bad cron boot crashes, one-shot seed re-fires, downtime misfire skip, and non-scalar input crashes.
Fable 5 referee pass for Sanskrit Lexicon papers rechecked data counts, caught swapped AP/AP90 edition counts and raw-vs-normalized table errors, and merged paper/reference fixes.
Boardsesh Fable co-authored fix prevents Co-Authored-By trailers and Claude session links from appearing in mobile What’s New cards, with regression tests and local changelog verification.
Fable 5 co-authored FedNow simulator PR adds an ordered advice ledger and ACWP-then-follow-up scenario for CTP scenario 4, with 15 simulator tests and docs updates.
Fable 5 co-authored hexa-lang release fix verifies GitHub Latest marker promotion after softprops make_latest silently left v0.588.0 pinned for seven days and broke consumers.

Fable co-authored a pil trajectory-certificate experiment measuring formal theorem premises on real AdamW+renorm P3 steps; 0 self-check violations, but real residuals satisfied the premise only 24-47% after warmup.

Fable co-authored vision-ai MJPEG stream re-framing so browser streams survive container restarts, plus waterline-based vessel re-identification to prevent detector-box flicker from resetting target IDs.
Fable-authored Tomo fix records system-originated continuity/cron/restart messages in channel transcripts instead of making proactive assistant replies invisible to recall.
Fable co-authored hexa-lang CI performance fix gating an x86_64-linux native object path to Linux hosts after Darwin arm64 wasted ~24 minutes before falling back to clang.
Fable-authored tidyrun fix resolves parametrized DAG subset dependencies by tracking parent/key provenance instead of failing object-identity membership checks.

Claude Fable 5 authored an elizaOS TUI fix for plus-key bindings, NFD combining-mark width, and theme-dependent nested-list rendering, with 485 tests, typecheck, mutation checks, and maintainer re-verification.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored elizaOS credential-pool hardening after review found zero-revenue affiliate minting and monetized-app billing bypasses; follow-up tests and post-merge review narrowed remaining attribution behavior.

canvas-ade used a Fable-synthesized multi-agent review on a 70-file background-project-sessions epic, fixing five bugs plus cleanups, then an automated Claude review found and fixed cross-project preview reuse and watermark issues.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a merged Tilo portal fix adding preview, integration, and delete actions for private datasets in Ready phase, with ownership checks, Redis cleanup, and frontend/backend tests.
Browser Use ran Claude Fable 5 on 100 BU Bench V1 browser-agent tasks, reporting 80% pass, $580.87 API cost, 6m53s average task time, 16 incorrect failures, and four 30-minute timeouts.

Fable co-authored an enterprise audit fix batch for illustration-studio after a 31-agent workflow found 15 confirmed issues, including a 1pp overstated IRR, cross-currency chart bugs, security hardening, and Windows CI parity.

Fable co-authored a draft Spotify track-manager cross-language duplicate detector using offline LaBSE embeddings, background generation guards, SQLite embedding cache, 169 backend tests, typecheck/lint, and multi-agent review.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a C# auction-api formal-verification sidecar with Verify attributes, Roslyn C#-to-Dafny skeleton generation, 42 proof obligations, Dafny 4.11 pinning, and a CI drift/verification workflow.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored and merged Kindred backend chat-image and presence infrastructure: quarantined uploads, private chat-media promotion, per-fetch match authorization, Redis presence ZSETs, and OpenAPI/client docs updates.

Claude Code/Fable authored a Go LogBot daemon that tails skynet.log, classifies network events, alerts Telegram with severity routing and rate limits, and includes httptest/tail tests around 85% coverage.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored and merged paq tar symlink extraction support, fixing Node.js archive installs while deferring symlink creation and rejecting absolute/out-of-tree targets with tests.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a GoFiber RFC 9110 compliance audit and fix series for conditional freshness, obsolete HTTP-date parsing, Vary wildcard behavior, and default content negotiation, with repeated review-fix rounds.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored Hearth POS room-channel and per-party table billing fixes, preventing arbitrary room folio posting and enabling multiple bills on one table with E2E coverage, 180 backend tests, and live cashier verification.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored and merged chembuider-rs rich-text molecular labels with baseline-accurate sub/superscripts, markup parsing, chemistry charge conventions, headless egui tests, and CPU-rasterized snapshot verification.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored NM-Waves release-readiness audit and fix plan, then committed fixes for hooks crashes, public signup privilege escalation, parent dashboard access, EOL Firebase config, PII/invoice exposure, parent onboarding writes, and sponsor finance scoping.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored an AutoAxionLimits benchmark partial-run report after credits exhausted at 58/346 papers, documenting paired-slice median error, zero-overlap rate, vector_trace wins, and per-paper cost estimates for resuming.
Fable 5 merged an FHE bootstrap optimization that fused a seven-row MAC pass, documented a 2.7% failed attempt, and reduced reported gas from 438,987,321 to 403,363,373.
Fable 5 co-authored a merged setup.sh fix after a deploy canary found noninteractive overwrite prompts and self-copy crashes; verified headless install from repo root exits 0.
Fable 5 co-authored ak-gemini fixes for Chat seed JSON-envelope poisoning and ignored top-level sampling options, with 11 offline regression tests and seven red-to-green cases.
Fable 5 co-authored Gans Ente login fixes: move memory-hard Argon2id off the main actor, reset stranded loading state, improve no-authenticator 404 copy, and wipe KEK/login-key copies.
Fable 5 co-authored a whole-app UAT audit for an Electron app: six agents, ~780 rows, five confirmed bugs, stale-claim pruning by grep, and test-health evidence.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored Hearth reservation fixes after testing three suspected holes: walk-in orders on reserved tables, QR orders from reserved tables, and double-bookings inside a ±90-minute window, with E2E coverage and companion frontend/backend changes.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a tods-validate benchmark publication that documents synthetic feed methodology and single-threaded validation results from 1k to 100k trips, falling from ~54k rows/s to ~31k rows/s as feed size grows.

Claude Fable 5 authored clojurust map-entry semantics so 2-element vectors no longer masquerade as map entries, touching map seq surfaces, key/val behavior, clojure.walk preservation, and Rust integration tests.

Claude Fable 5 authored Typhon diagnostic dedupe fix so identical type errors at different spans are all reported while preserving sealed-union distribution collapse, verified with 2461 tests, examples, stress suite, clippy, and perf gate.

Claude Fable 5 authored Quillmark span-based PDF/form region tracking that replaces explicit metadata tags with codegen eval windows, glyph-span scanning, fieldAt WASM binding, migrated tests, and contract documentation across 22 files.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a GeometryOps.jl prepared-geometry WIP with recursive Prepared wrappers, edge trees/R-trees, indexed point-in-polygon and clipping accelerators, tests, and benchmark/design-document commits.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a merged cls-hooked fix for AsyncLocalStorage context loss in re-entrant bind/raw enter-exit paths, based on a minimal repro from a large consumer test suite and new regression coverage.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a merged AdvancedDiagnosis XCP-on-TCP server: ~220 measurable channels, scalar/map calibration, dynamic DAQ, A2L export, GUI/headless control, and 32 tests including localhost pyxcp end-to-end coverage.

Claude Fable 5 produced a large Daccord Flutter complexity audit and multi-phase refactor: unused dependency pruning, shared helpers, Riverpod migrations, message-pane extraction, voice reconnect logic, and 431-test gates.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored tods-validate baseline fingerprints for stable validation diffs, replacing tuple identities with SHA-256 hashes over machine-context data and proving a 500-finding row-shift case produces zero false new/fixed findings.
Fable 5 co-authored merged Extreme Games netcode fixes for dying-frame shots, malformed WebSocket frames, latency-based position age, and relay testability, raising tests from 71 to 92.

Fable 5 audited Cascivo against a Trade Republic-style dashboard, specified missing chart/showcase work, then helped implement candlestick interactions, trading UI, simulation, screenshots, registry entries, and tests across 105 files.

Fable 5 extended Owner Operator active-thread scanning to pi, opencode, Antigravity, and Grok Build transcript formats, with parser assumptions documented and integration coverage for all four finders.
Fable 5 co-authored a 53-file Machine Karte platform with web and mobile apps, QR machine records, inspection templates, bilingual certificates, company scoping, auth, and demo seed data.
Fable 5 co-authored a merged MegaStat package covering broad statistical tests, corrections, Excel reports, CLI and Uvicorn web UI, Render setup, and seven deterministic tests.

Fable 5 repaired a clinic-system production smoke test after demo-tenant and API drift, updating current domain, health handling, staff_id, mental_exam, 204 approval handling, and reporting a full 10-step production pass.
LangWatch traced a real Claude Code/Fable 5 request-body truncation bug that misclassified 12,729 input tokens, then added system/leading-turn recovery with extractor and log-to-span tests.
Beads Fable co-authored fix handles a real embedded-Dolt migration deadlock where dirty-table guards blocked bd dolt/vc commit, adding typed errors, open intents, and tests.
Chirp Fable 5 PR fixed a stuck Nostr home timeline and missing Android JNI ref-resolution wrapper, verified with Rust/Gradle tests and live emulator before/after card rendering.
emdash Fable co-authored seed fix prevents raw SQLite failures when seeded slugs collide with trashed content, based on a dev setup bypass 500 and tests that fail on main.
SkyRL-Fleet Fable co-authored PR fixes Qwen 3.6 tool-call argument shape so rollouts no longer all fail at step-zero collation after the first tool call.
agentic_matmul Fable co-authored cleanup removed Apple/macOS code paths from a Mojo GEMM while keeping x86 dispatch/tests and quick benchmark ratios green.
Fable review found a 120 mm helium-decay-volume overlap with SHiP SBT side sensors; PR fixes the X inset, shows numeric clearance math, and reports 33/33 tests passing.
pnpm merged a Fable/Claude-assisted fix rejecting malformed jsr: and named-registry package names that could flow into registry URLs and metadata cache paths; TS and Rust parser suites passed.
xpf WireGuard engine PR from fable-review finding adds a next keypair slot so responder rekeys no longer blackhole all egress until inbound data confirms the session; 3510 release tests passed.
xpf merged a Fable-review event stream fix making sequence allocation atomic with channel enqueue, preventing self-amplifying resync/disconnect loops; 3511 release tests passed.
bfeed wave-four Fable audit remediation fixes nine DNS rebinding, CSP, SSRF, fetch, and sanitizer hardening items with unit and end-to-end checks.
Crewhub2’s Fable co-authored camera-director milestone adds room/HQ framing, live robot follow cam, restore flights, and caught a blocker where Escape restored to the wrong camera snapshot.
Fable co-authored vision-ai MJPEG reconnect and marine-tracker stability work: part-boundary stream splicing, waterline re-id, track locks, DeepStream config fixes, docs, and tests.
Fable-authored Leaflet feed audit fixed malformed RSS link whitespace plus multiple RSS/Atom/JSON feed defects across filters, dates, cache, XML legality, and absolute assets.
Fable co-authored Precedent Machine coverage-denominator fix for Kraft filing tail exclusion, raising fully extracted coverage from 59.6% to 89.2% with tests.
Fable-authored backtester per-cap 3DGapFade gate fix raised labeled recall from 18/36 to 32/36 and recovered large-cap/ETF setups while reducing small/micro false positives.
Fable co-authored wmaker-ng Rocky 8 packaging fix: glibc 2.28 RPM lane, EL8/EL9 dist tags, executable payload modes, and package mode gate verified in a 16-package container sim.
Fable co-authored libfprint Goodix 55b4 driver fix using frame-diff finger-release detection, deactivate poll cancellation, and measured thresholds verified on Lenovo hardware.

Tolmo reports Fable 5 taking an empty directory to a booting NT-shaped Rust kernel core in 38 active minutes, touching 43 files and ~5,100 lines, with QEMU self-tests and documented self-debugged kernel bugs.

PatientTrac merged Fable-review safety fixes so unknown convertible medical units are skipped rather than mislabeled, malformed lab bounds cannot mark abnormal results normal, and 10 regressions pass with 166 tests green.
xpf merged a Fable-review fix preventing syn_cookie_master_key from being serialized into world-readable state.json, with an audit of related secrets and red-on-revert serialization tests.

gofinance merged a Fable co-authored test rewrite that replaced tautological finance assertions and loose tolerances with independently computed closed-form values, finding no production-code changes needed.

nvoc’s Fable co-authored audit PR hardens self-hosted GPU CI against unreviewed fork reruns, adds 35 existing optimizer tests to CI, and introduces Dependabot plus cargo-audit, pip-audit, and actionlint checks.
classifyre’s Fable co-authored harness PR adds token, cost, and duration accounting across Claude/OpenAI/Gemini providers, schema retries, AgentRun persistence, API usage buckets, and a UI Usage tab.
Fable co-authored SPAKE2 cryptographic hardening: BoringSSL-matching Ed25519 decode normalization, robust confirmation-token errors, secret redaction/scrubbing, SRI hashes, and expanded tests.
Fable co-authored a Strava GitHub Actions fix that removed a failing gh secret write which leaked refreshed access tokens in public logs, added token masking, and improved API error handling.

Fable co-authored Nobleport contract and trust-engine backend work: signed proposals become immutable contract records, change orders roll up separately, evidence-object verification was added, and 151 tests passed.

Fable co-authored a Daedalus Dialog Suite editor performance/correctness slice: abort-safe ingestion, parse deduplication, category-stable merges, narrower React subscriptions, perf fixtures, and many regression tests.

Fable co-authored eight HighRise mail-merge features with unit tests: fallbacks, worksheet picker, duplicate blocking, test sends, throttling, CC/BCC, suppression list, and attachments, while documenting Reply-To transport limits.

Fable co-authored a wasm2go compiler robustness fix for constant width conversions that otherwise emitted invalid amd64 extends; regenerated bundles stayed byte-identical and amd64/arm64 tests plus lint passed.

Fable co-authored a cmux-orchestrator live-control update adding SSE state, approval-gated kill/restart tools, real session UI, Activity/History views, and 553 Python/24 sidecar/19 frontend tests passing.

Fable co-authored judicative’s stricter evaluation harness, MCP self-test server, and blind-panel workflow; its first self-test scored 46.36 fail, a second pass scored 89.55 pass, and three blind judges agreed on the ranking.
Fable co-authored Ylmish characterization tests pinning Yjs and Adaptify semantics from a redesign plan, including IndexList delta behavior and key-stable HashMap contrast, across 655 additions.

Fable co-authored a verdi-go design audit that found shipped schema conformance failures rejecting spec-compliant claims files with unknown field id, then split Phase 3 into conformance and --focus graph workstreams.

Fable-authored secure-agent OS update-capsule PR adds a no-std Rust parser/verification pipeline, CLI, golden vectors, corruption tests, fuzz targets, CI, and reports 23.6M parse / 1.7M verify fuzz executions with Verus proof still pending.

CoreVideoPro Fable PR wires engine audio-routing sends into the WinUI grid, fixes select-vs-remove route behavior, preserves in-flight gain edits, and reports 245 MediaCore and 444 WinUI tests passing.

MarkView merged a Fable co-authored CI optimization fixing a macOS SwiftPM cache path, Playwright/npm caching, duplicate guard workflow runs, and extended cache keys, estimating 30–60s typical savings plus a 2m31s skip on non-rendering PRs.

Daedalus Dialog Suite Fable PR upgrades Electron 29 to 43 and electron-builder 26, removes version-pin drift, adds a Playwright smoke, and reports 131 Jest suites / 893 tests plus typecheck, builds, and lint green.

Nimbus PR used Fable for design/review/closeout of true bounded range reads, encrypted partial-span auth, filesystem hardening, and lazy object opens, with 216 crate tests plus fmt/clippy/deny/make gates and BRH 5/5 verifiers green.

elizaOS merged a Fable-authored embeddings billing fix that bypasses optimistic fast paths for affiliate-marked requests, closing a base-cost-only admission hole; mutation-verified tests and all 29 embeddings tests passed.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored an Approach-Map aviation layer adding CIFP-derived MSA/TAA parsing, terrain rendering, safe-altitude sector overlays, d-TPP chart metadata, selection guards, and a draggable FAA-style vertical profile panel across 56 files.

Claude Fable 5 authored clojurust Tier-1 promotion fixes so interpreter-special forms like method interop, Math/abs, (var f), and with-out-str no longer mislower to nil or missing globals after IR promotion.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored Hearth backend/frontend operating tweaks after reservation and room-service flows: 15-minute reservation holds, lazy no-show refresh, low-stock to prefilled PO, aggregator net-realization reporting, delivered confirmation, 186 backend tests, tsc clean, and live app verification.

Apache Pulsar maintainer Lari Hotari used Claude Code with Fable 5 and Opus 4.8 agents on a large PIP-478 async auth/TLS SPI implementation branch, including TLS factory flip work, OAuth2/HTTP/SASL migration, proxy/admin/broker-client TLS paths, metrics, and Personal CI validation.

Quillmark used a Claude Fable 5 friction report from migrating a web app onto unreleased LiveSession/regions APIs to surface plate_file cutover breakage, weak region coverage, document lifetime hazards, missing warnings, stale version stamping, and later fieldAt/dirty-page fixes.
Quorum merged a Claude Fable 5 co-authored governance-portal XSS fix covering sanitized rich text, URL scheme filtering, Zod validation for event doc URLs, and 252 lines of route tests.

OpenRadioss PR fixes a Claude Fable 5-authored GPU shell-offload bug where no-contact decks skipped kernels, produced zero shell forces, and collapsed DT2T; adds launch, reduction, fallback, diagnostics, and workflow docs.
py-typedlogic PR uses Claude Fable 5 to fix Z3/prover behavior around NegationAsFailure, add Clark completion, and cover a five-line repro with new CLI, solver, and transformation tests.

Slinky PR has four Claude Fable 5 commits adding missing CLI commands, daemon reload, trust audit, status JSON, secret-read audit trail, scoped exec, cache warming, custom delimiters, and fnox/secretspec/1Password integrations across 47 files.

DeepLifeSimulator PR uses Claude Fable 5 to root-cause about 16 player issues and implement fixes across family, notifications, events, disease balance, banking, dating, company economy, and save migration with targeted tests.

ai-fication-kit PR uses Claude Fable 5 to add a durable AI engineering loop with WORKLOG verification, /fix-bug and /review-change workflows across four tool integrations, dogfooding artifacts, and 347/347 tests green.

Sonar tested Claude Code with Fable 5 on gctoolkit: 1,222 lines in about 13 minutes, but SonarQube Cloud failed the PR for a HIGH-severity insecure temporary-directory issue and insufficient coverage.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored Kafka PR KAFKA-20769, changing ListDeserializer to use readFully so truncated mid-entry payloads throw instead of becoming zero-padded corrupted values, with a regression test and local checks.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored an AshAndEmber audit PR fixing 84-day-year math, double-charged aging, lost magic talent effects, save-state leaks, cooldown units, and startup guards across 19 files with tests.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored Tilo frontend auth fixes: token-bearing dataset activation, single-flight JWT refresh on 401, stale activation labels, admin/dashboard request race guards, and new tests across 15 files.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored random-picker design and plan for a Google Sheets category-combination mode, implemented across 15 files with Vitest tests and build validation.

Fable-authored headlines-neutralizer hardening fixed cross-browser userscript failures, surrogate handling, retry/billing loops, MutationObserver performance, cache cleanup, and shipped with 387 unit tests, four e2e tests, and a headless-Chromium smoke.
Fable co-authored Waves Previewer FLAC support with Symphonia/flacenc, spec-correct STREAMINFO MD5, metadata carry-over, loop-marker sidecars, UI/installer updates, and format-support docs.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored Kafka KAFKA-20770, making LocalLeaderEndPoint return UNDEFINED_EPOCH instead of fabricated epoch 0 when the leader epoch cache cannot resolve an offset, with new concrete regression tests.
Fable co-authored Superwizor client-invite flow from a Flutter client-record sheet plus backend magic-link accept fixes for a pool deadlock and login fallback, with analyze/build evidence.

Fable authored a 3,929-line Three.js Turkish çengel bulmaca game with verified generated boards, 3D canvas cells, Turkish keyboard support, mobile keyboard, WebAudio effects, and offline vendored Three.js.
Championz Pr3dict0r merged a Fable co-authored contract upgrade and oracle relayer with 18 contract tests, 53 relayer tests, live dry-run fixes, and a staging cron for July fixtures.
statsfinder Fable PR adds a thin FastMCP stdio server over /v1 API endpoints, with .mcp.json discovery, docs, filters, and a real stdio smoke test for pass-through and error behavior.
oto Fable PR optimizes multi-track layout and playback by avoiding repeated track layout, off-screen rendering, per-note AudioParam writes, global playhead invalidations, and per-pointer autosaves.

pod-certificate-signer Fable PR fixes controller races, concurrency/config/RBAC mismatches, unverifiedUserAnnotations parsing, CA rotation behavior, and adds tests across reconciliation and trust-bundle paths.
Delvers Fable PR implements spatial combat primitives with headless tests and adopts a procedural 3D Godot theater with poseable low-poly actors, prototype scenes, and verified GIF renders.
oghie-kwd-store merged a Fable-authored Vitest/RTL suite and CI fix after production registration and footer-link regressions, with lint/typecheck and 17 tests passing.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a cachew S3 metadata rewrite from lock-serialized JSON objects to an append-only journal with canonical replay, leaderless compaction, one-PUT writes, and 391 lines of S3 internal tests.

Fable 5 co-authored home-energy-manager dispatch changes using Fox Backup mode for negative-price holds, based on 35 days / 15,232 production samples, then fixed five adversarial-review findings with invariant tests.

Schellingboard’s mixed Opus/Fable admin stack culminates in Fable 5 commits adding server-side pagination/search for locations, proposals, and sessions, with hundreds of new E2E/integration test lines and Qodo review findings.

Fable 5 co-authored a streaming-recommendations app migration from clipboard/data.json workflow to Supabase auth, RLS-protected per-user tables, replacement Edge Function, Google sign-in, and a keepalive workflow.
Fable 5 authored a Korean-market swing-trading module with premarket regime scoring, risk controls, paper/KIS broker adapter, backtesting, scheduler, optional LLM bridge, and 20 offline tests.

Fable 5 co-authored a plaudern refactor removing the local speaker-id ML sidecar, standardizing on hosted ElevenLabs/pyannoteAI paths, moving clip extraction in-process, dropping embedding columns, and widening CI coverage.

pxpipe is a local Claude Code proxy that renders bulky request context as PNGs; its README reports Fable 5 reading 48k-character image pages, finishing a 39-file token-count/ledger demo at $6.06 versus $42.21 text-only, with explicit caveats about lossy exact-value OCR.
Mitos PR uses Claude Fable 5 to replace a zero live-usage stub with a Kubernetes-backed sandbox replica counter and to route console billing suspensions into the shared gateway kill-switch store.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored DROSTE, a 1,700-line WebGL2 VJ tool with beat clock, microphone beat detection, MIDI-learned parameters, Droste/Escher infinite zoom, presets, and export/import.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored and merged a portfolio-tracker frontend revamp with shared chart/activity/allocation components and a fix clipping 1D portfolio series to market open.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored and merged an ideeep math-rendering fix that prevents KaTeX tilde accents from being reparsed by pulldown-cmark as GFM strikethrough tags.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a powsybl-diagram performance pass over force layout, SVG formatting, edge grouping, voltage-level scans, and sort keys, preserving byte-identical reference SVG/JSON output.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored callstack/agent-device migration from rslib to tsdown/Rolldown, cutting build time from about 53s to about 2s while preserving package entry contracts.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored LWD-Invoices dashboard and report performance work: org-tagged caches, per-request membership dedupe, SQL report aggregation, background year-end exports, and index verification.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored Superwizor billing fix for a live-tested MANUAL subscription reset bug, reactivating non-Stripe test subscriptions and minting missing counters inside an advisory-locked transaction.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a merged RSC TAE IFES decree-conformance sweep, aligning rules and PDFs with Decreto 13.048/2026 and verifying 135 input/output checks plus E2E migration/package generation.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored ldk-node manual-route circular self-payment support behind a default-off cycles feature, with native preimages, PaymentKind::Rebalance records, and guarded inline self-claiming.

Datasette PR by Simon Willison uses Fable to write a full JSON API reference and stability review, then implement canonical JSON success/error envelopes, extensible introspection endpoints, permission filtering, and tests.
Megane Fable PR rewrites cartoon ribbon playback to update buffers in place, adding a benchmark that reports 26.5ms to 10.9ms per frame plus a verified Vite vendor-chunk split.
csp PR remediates a Fable 5 audit finding where sampled stack high-water data could select too-small arm64 stack slots, adding a differential test and reporting 757/757 ANALYSE=1 tests green.

BlockDB Fable PR fixes 32 Rust compile errors and turns the prototype into a running Hyper HTTP database with WAL durability, blockchain-backed consent events, Argon2id auth, CI, and 91 passing tests.

Automattic blocks-engine PR uses Fable via opencode to decompose animated marketing sections into native blocks, reducing section core/html fallbacks from 12 to 0 and adding 225 editable blocks in the fixture matrix.
Superwizor Fable PR fixes a live-tested duplicate-role invitation failure, mapping a unique-constraint 500 to EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED with bilingual UI copy and reported backend/site verification.

Outline has an open Fable co-authored fix for a CSRF failure mode that appeared when safe requests rotated the token cookie while a mutating request was already prepared. The branch changes the API client to re-read the cookie immediately before each network attempt, refreshes form hidden fields at submit time, and adds route-level suppression for high-frequency GET paths such as attachment redirects and local file reads that were rotating the token for every inline image. Six Claude-authored commits touch the React form helper, API client, CSRF middleware, storage route, and attachment route, turning a concurrency bug into an explicit server/client contract.

A merged Fable-authored `tmu-rust` PR adds online growth for categorical features without throwing away a trained Tsetlin Machine. New categorical tokens and unknown sentinels are appended after existing feature indices, dense automata state is re-laid out around the shifted negated-literal block, and new literals start just excluded so predictions on old data remain bit-identical after growth. The 1,077-addition branch includes an executable `examples/growing.rs` path that trains on phase-A tokens, extends the encoder and model for phase-B tokens, preserves phase-A accuracy exactly, and then learns the new tokens through continued training.

Fable built a 1,779-line Claude plugin that turns the Swiss Cheese model of layered defense into a reusable agentic-coding workflow. The plugin ships commands for initialization, review, autonomous loops, custom layers, audit, knowledge discovery, and status; six lane-scoped review agents for correctness, security, architecture, performance, tests, and docs; plus stdlib-only scripts for repo probing, diff snapshots, layer checks, status, and hook gating. A follow-up commit gives every agent committed project memory under `.claude/agent-memory/`, including a feedback path so dismissed findings can become lane-specific false-positive knowledge.

Fable co-authored a 5,140-line TypeScript MVP for a pull-request review agent rather than just a prompt wrapper. It introduces task-level agent runners for Claude and Copilot, a VCS abstraction with CodeCommit implemented and GitHub/GitLab stubbed, severity and confidence filtering, fingerprint deduplication, comment caps, ignore globs, CI auto-detection, and a local self-review mode. The later Copilot backend commit adds deny-by-default permission handlers, write confinement for knowledge generation, JSON-fence parsing, auth-failure diagnostics, and mocked-client tests around prompt wiring, permissions, cleanup, and error handling.

Olympus has a large Fable-authored hardening and agent-tooling branch whose first commit closes a concrete SSRF gap: hostnames were validated at resolve time, but sockets could re-resolve before connect and hit a rebinding-controlled IP. The fix validates every resolved address, returns the exact pinned IP to dial, keeps HTTPS SNI and certificate checks bound to the original host, and adds regressions for mixed records, pin-the-dial behavior, and record flips. The same branch adds bounded code-navigation tools, diff-previewed edits, dynamic tool selection, teacher escalation, a deep-research pipeline, search-provider fallbacks, GitHub skill import, `ask_user`, and email-style drafting, with 2,988 additions across implementation and focused tests.
Merged ccbot PR uses Fable 5 after a 16-lens review found 38 root causes and 12 blockers, rewriting delivery around ack-gated offsets, tmux verification, supervised loops, and 583 passing tests.

Open ai4curation PR uses Fable 5 to turn a pathway-satisfiability project into methods/background pages, marimo/static demos, and live-engine-derived biology figures with explicit caveats about schematic projections.

Open verdi-bench PR uses Fable 5 to add observability, operator/reviewer/authoring UIs, trajectory detail, forensics, bundles, and schema-lineage reconciliation while preserving ledger contracts and reporting 725 tests passing.

Stuff Library PR documents a Fable 5 production browser walkthrough from signup to empty shelf, producing 16 verified UX findings including four conflicting names for one place and concrete copy/mechanics issues.

ProjectOps360 PR uses Fable 5 to introduce a two-browser Playwright realtime E2E plus CI-safe selector/spec guards, verifying task-status updates propagate to Workboard and Living Graph without reload.

investment-monitor PR uses Fable 5 to add a volatility-forecasting lab with strict t-to-t+1 forecasters, evaluation/reporting, vol-managed variants, and 19 new tests including no-look-ahead properties.

Claude Fable 5 co-authored a Darkness Steam Audio hot-path fix that split duplicated voice/slot direct-source work, cutting direct_sim from 9.616ms to 5.254ms p50 and 11.204ms to 5.636ms p99 with 51,785 assertions passing.
OpenCAD land-survey plugin merged Fable co-authored DWG persistence, surface rebuild, and strict transform-input validation work, later live-verified on OCS v0.7.4 with 57 tests passing.
Fable-authored opensyber-mcp-watch 0.3.0 added stdio MCP transport, JSON/webhook/GitHub Action outputs, and verified poisoned-server CI failure behavior with 71 tests passing.

SAIUGOL merged a Fable-labeled football bot update adding configurable team copy, ESPN standings/stats parsing, crest media attachments, daily digests, pre-match previews, mention replies, and 172 reported tests.
Skylark Fable 5 co-authored PR decouples issues from origin chats, adds a chat CLI so agents route updates themselves, and fixes a migration-replay boundary bug surfaced by the schema change.
Claude Fable 5 co-authored powsybl-network-viewer performance work replacing nested scans, per-edge DOM probes, repeated layout reads, and whole-tree hover queries in grid map and diagram viewers.

p2panda has an open Fable 5 co-authored PR that starts with a design-interview specification for a peer-to-peer salience engine, then follows it with a full Rust implementation. The crate records exposure, dwell, and interaction events, log-compacts time buckets, applies Bayesian-smoothed conversion-rate estimates, ranks items and scopes with explainable score components, and exchanges tiered trust-weighted peer digests. The validation notes say the implementation landed with 37 unit and property tests plus a position-biased feed simulation that recovered ground-truth preferences across seeds, and two spec refinements were folded back after validation showed the first pooling design drowned out scope signals.

A Fable 5 co-authored MCP-CRM branch begins as a refactor of hardcoded deployment URLs and duplicated MCP tool definitions, then moves into a serious authentication repair. The security commit says access tokens had only been checked for `exp`, issuer, and audience claims, so an unsigned forged token with a user email could reach CRM data; the fix verifies RS256 signatures against the deployment JWKS at every HTTP token entry point and converts CRM and OAuth storage functions to internal Convex APIs. The PR also reports a local harness using an RS256 keypair where valid tokens passed and tampered payloads, wrong-key signatures, expired tokens, wrong issuer or audience, `alg=none`, and malformed tokens were rejected.

Cortex AntiCheat merged a Fable 5 co-authored rewrite that replaces a single event listener with buffered checks for speed, high jump, flight, timer abuse, no-fall, reach, KillAura angle, MultiAura, NoSwing, autoclicker consistency, block timing, scaffold, ESP trace, and packet-rate behavior. The same 1,522-addition PR adds join, teleport, respawn, knockback, and damage grace periods to cut false positives, then hardens cross-server ban sync with HMAC-SHA256, timestamps, single-use nonces, and rejection of client-forged bridge messages. Follow-up in the merged branch also adjusted movement listener priority because setbacks mutate events, which is the kind of integration detail that usually only appears after running against the host plugin model.

ai-fication-kit has an open Fable 5 co-authored engineering loop that first adds an R3 adversarial audit, then commits fixes against it. The audit found 11 new defects after PR #23, including a P0 drift gate failure on main, a `--force` child-lock false positive against the project’s own template prose, backups written before consent despite printing “nothing written,” and an `orient` rerun that wiped wizard context; four findings were reproduced live. Later commits fix the R3 defects, add fail-first tests, re-anchor the drift baseline, and record a reviewer finding where anchor rewrite consumed multi-line notes.

Godzilla’s Fable 5 co-authored PR starts by adding a 65-item verified backlog for a static-analysis engine, each item carrying file-line evidence, an adversarial-verification verdict where available, impact, and a fix direction. The same open PR then implements much of that roadmap across dozens of commits: fail-closed incomplete coverage, finding fingerprints and baselines, default propagators, raw-config secret scanning, gated build execution, Java and Python rule packs, TypeScript and ES-module support, Rust parser fuzzing, taint paths, guard sanitizers, flow-sensitive taint, and an agentic LLM reviewer. It is still a large open review, but the commit trail shows the audit becoming concrete analyzer, rule, performance, and trust infrastructure rather than remaining a planning document.

Eden merged a compact Fable 5 co-authored rendering fix for jagged 2D panorama reflections. The old path rebuilt diagonal or curved painted regions as staircase pieces from elevation rows and azimuth column swaths, producing shredded slivers and clip-path hairlines; the new path samples a signed-distance field through the reflected-direction fields, contours it at zero, and stacks color regions as nested upper sets so smoothing cannot open background gaps. The PR also records practical rendering fixes discovered along the way: one-cell padding, pushing contours past the projected water outline, clipping to the trapezoid, and forcing an isolated buffer so antialiasing happens once against the composite.
